member.name: Prof. Mohamed Al-Aziz
member.title: Chairman
member.bio: Founder of SonoSchool and pioneer of POCUS education in the MENA region.

member.name: Dr. Sarah Thompson
member.title: Vice Chair
member.bio: International lead for WINFOCUS curriculum development and accreditation.

member.name: Dr. Karim Hisham
member.title: Executive Director
member.bio: Oversees day-to-day operations and strategic partnerships across the region.

member.name: Dr. Layla Al-Mansouri
member.title: Director of Education
member.bio: Leads curriculum design, faculty training, and quality assurance.

member.name: Prof. Ricardo Fernandez
member.title: Director of Accreditation
member.bio: Ensures all SonoSchool programmes meet EFSUMB and WINFOCUS standards.

member.name: Dr. Hana Petersen
member.title: Director of Technology
member.bio: Drives the digital learning platform and simulation technology roadmap.
